Patch Set 1:

Hm... this simplistic description is jus from the very first patch where all it did was adding a forgotten free on an exit path.

Since then the patch got a whole bunch of other things, so might be worth to update the edscription to better explain the scope of changes?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(5 comments)

Looking at cfs_crypto_hash_final() looks like it will handle req == NULL, but looks like it would crash if accessing req is an ERR_PTR().

parents.subject: LU-16659 build: Detect the mofed path based on running kernel

commit.subject: LU-15615 target: Free t10pi crypto state on error
commit.message:
LU-15615 target: Free t10pi crypto state on error

Looks like when error happens we forgot to release crypto state that
not only leaks memory directly, but potentially can tie in-memory
pages too.

Change-Id: Ia0870ccbb194e4e9ca8701e1c01d519745c236df
